inputs.label: Refractive Index (n)
inputs.businessContext: Refractive index of the lens material (e.g., 1.5 for typical glass)

businessContext_i18n.en: Refractive index of the lens material (e.g., 1.5 for typical glass)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Lens malzemesinin kırılma indisi (örneğin, tipik cam için 1.5)
businessContext_i18n.de: Brechungsindex des Linsenmaterials (z. B. 1,5 für typisches Glas)

inputs.label: Radius of Curvature 1 (R1)
inputs.businessContext: Radius of curvature of the first lens surface; positive if center of curvature is to the right

businessContext_i18n.en: Radius of curvature of the first lens surface; positive if center of curvature is to the right
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birinci lens yüzeyinin eğrilik yarıçapı; eğrilik merkezi sağdaysa pozitif
businessContext_i18n.de: Krümmungsradius der ersten Linsenoberfläche; positiv, wenn der Krümmungsmittelpunkt rechts liegt

inputs.label: Radius of Curvature 2 (R2)
inputs.businessContext: Radius of curvature of the second lens surface; positive if center of curvature is to the right

businessContext_i18n.en: Radius of curvature of the second lens surface; positive if center of curvature is to the right
businessContext_i18n.tr: İkinci lens yüzeyinin eğrilik yarıçapı; eğrilik merkezi sağdaysa pozitif
businessContext_i18n.de: Krümmungsradius der zweiten Linsenoberfläche; positiv, wenn der Krümmungsmittelpunkt rechts liegt

inputs.label: Center Thickness (d)
inputs.businessContext: Thickness of the lens at its optical center

businessContext_i18n.en: Thickness of the lens at its optical center
businessContext_i18n.de: Dicke der Linse an ihrer optischen Mitte

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
